holdings.infoBox: SEIV is an equity ETF with a total of 128 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 3.50%, Micron Technology at 3.30%, Apple at 2.71%, Alphabet at 2.64%, and Flex Ltd. at 2.47%.

overview.description: The SEI Enhanced U.S. Large Cap Value Factor ETF (SEIV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund actively selects US large-cap stocks that are perceived to be at a discount relative to their fair valuation. SEIV was launched on May 18, 2022 and is issued by SEI.
